dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back, {{name}}. Here's your financial overview.
dashboard.tooltipNetWorth: Total assets minus total liabilities, updated daily
dashboard.tooltipAssets: Sum of all positive account balances
dashboard.tooltipLiabilities: Sum of credit cards, loans, and mortgage balances
dashboard.tooltipSpending: Total spending this month across all budget categories

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: View balances and performance across all your accounts.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Review and filter your recent activity across all accounts.

budget.title: Budget
budget.subtitle: Track your monthly spending against budget limits.
budget.rateCategoryDesc: How satisfied are you with your {{category}} spending this month?
budget.tooltipTotalBudget: Total amount budgeted across all categories
budget.tooltipTotalSpent: How much you've spent so far this month
budget.tooltipRemaining: Amount remaining before hitting your total budget limit

cards.title: Cards
cards.subtitle: Manage your credit and debit cards.
cards.noCards: No cards yet. Add your first card to get started.
cards.confirmDesc: Are you sure you want to add this card to your Lavender Finance account?
cards.addedDesc: Your card has been securely added to your account.
cards.addFlowSubtitle: Complete the steps below to securely add a new card.
cards.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to remove the card ending in {{last4}}? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update your profile, preferences, and app configuration.
settings.currencyDesc: Display amounts in your preferred currency
settings.developerDesc: Advanced options for testing with custom data.
settings.uploadJsonDesc: Replace the demo data with your own JSON file. The file will be validated before applying.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all current data as a JSON file you can re-import later.
settings.dataApplied: Custom data applied — {{counts}}. Reload pages to see changes.
settings.schemaHint: Provide any combination of: accounts, chart, transactions, budgets, spending

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
